title: Community Shelters * Ex-Offenders - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Community Shelters * Ex-Offenders 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Ex-Offenders Homeless Couples Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Homeless Youth Mothers Pregnant Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS HELPING HANDS REENTRY TILLAMOOK COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter and transitional housing. Participants have access to food and clothing, assistance with applying for health insurance, and a comprehensive needs assessment process supported by a case manager. Can provide information and referrals about identification replacement, schooling, and job placement services. 6505 Headquarter Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: -Adults age 18 and older and families with children under age 18 experiencing homelessness or are re-entering the community from incarceration -Clients must not have or be under the influence of any intoxicants on-site. Individuals with a registered sex offense are not eligible. Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Emergency Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 354-8014 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS HELPING HANDS REENTRY TILLAMOOK COUNTY
